initiatives.name: Glacier Queer Alliance
initiatives.description: Providing positive, safe, community resources, events, and spaces for people of all gender identities and sexual orientations in the Flathead Valley.

initiatives.name: Transvisible Montana
initiatives.description: A coalition of transgender, non-binary, and two spirit individuals and organizations throughout the state of Montana. We provide workshops, leadership opportunities, education, and more to the people of Montana.

initiatives.name: Montanans for Choice
initiatives.description: Montanans for Choice works to advance gender equity, sexual health, and reproductive freedom through public education, communications, and advocacy.

initiatives.name: Montana For Palestine
initiatives.description: We are Montanans proud to stand in solidarity with the Palestinian people in their quest for justice

initiatives.name: Montana Sexual and Reproductive Health Collective
initiatives.description: We are a group of organizations and individuals committed to protecting and progressing sexual and reproductive health care in Montana.

initiatives.name: Montana Abortion Access Program
initiatives.description: Montana's statewide abortion fund exists to bridge the gap between our fundamental right to access abortion care and our actual ability to access this care.
